# Photo gallery

::: {.callout-tip title="Full resolution photos and videos"}

High-resolution photos will be archived on
[Zenodo](https://zenodo.org/communities/bioconductor/records?q=&l=list&p=1&s=10&sort=newest)
in the coming weeks, and
recordings of conference sessions will be published on the
[Bioconductor YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/user/bioconductor) (follow the channel to get notified).


:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis
#| label: photo_gallery
source("../R/photo_gallery.R")
.create_photo_gallery()
```
